opening_line: My apartment is 4C. The door across from me now says 4C. Mine still says 4B on the inside but the hallway plaque changed overnight.
notes_for_player: Directory conflict. Hall plaque does not match tenant records.

questions.label: Ask location
questions.response: Fourth floor, west stack. Between the elevator and the garbage chute.

questions.label: Ask appearance
questions.response: No person. Just wrong numbers. Fresh screw marks.

questions.label: Ask timeline
questions.response: I noticed when I took the trash out. Building directory in the lobby still lists old layout.

questions.label: Request camera check
questions.response: Look at the doors. You'll see. Management never notified us.
